name: sylvester-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Sylvester Francis.

plugins.name: scaffolding-go-projects
plugins.description: Best-practice layout and tooling for scaffolding a new Go project (application or library), with annotated golang-standards/project-layout guidance.

plugins.name: scaffolding-typescript-projects
plugins.description: Best-practice layout and tooling for scaffolding a new TypeScript project (Node service, NestJS app, CLI, or npm library), including tsconfig strictness, module format, the package.json exports map, and NestJS conventions.
